svg.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.text: Native Azure orchestration · Each agent loads its versioned SKILL.md at runtime · Encoded operational knowledge lives in the repo, not in prompt strings
Azure DriftGuard pipeline (7 stages) — Azure OpenAI / managed AI Agent Service
→ clears 9 state keys (release_notes · classification_result · change_analyser_result · decision_maker_result · terraform_result · jira_result · pr_result · pipeline_mode · pipeline_halted)
→ writes eval artifact to disk when CAPTURE_ENABLED=true
AGENT SKILLS LAYER — versioned in repo, loaded on demand

1. cb_before_pipeline clears state 2. stop_guard / connectivity_guard runs 3. agent reads SKILL.md + relevant sub-files 4. LLM call with skill as system context 5. tool calls 6. writes output_key to session.state
• Key Vault: SQL / Jira / GitHub secrets
skills/ baked into container image at build time · alt: mounted via ConfigMap for hot updates without redeploy · versioned in same repo as agent code
